buildCommand: CFG="$(find /vercel -maxdepth 6 -name next.config.js -not -path '*/node_modules/*' 2>/dev/null | head -1)"; D="$(dirname "$CFG")"; R="$(dirname "$D")"; echo "frontend=$D root=$R"; cd "$D" && npx --no-install next build && rm -rf "$R/out" && cp -r out "$R/out" && echo "copied out -> $R/out"
